backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining a Post type with id, title, description, contentType (text/link/image), content, imageUrl, and timestamp, exposing functions to create posts, get all posts sorted by timestamp descending, search posts by title/description, and get a single post by id.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three completed features: adding 'MOD x RDX' text next to the logo in HomePage.tsx, adding the same text in the mobile menu in Layout.tsx, and updating the color scheme to #7B2EFF in index.css.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files describing the MOD x RDX application structure, including routing, layout with logo and branding, post display and creation, search functionality, contact/about/privacy pages, and styling with #7B2EFF purple theme.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration defining OKLCH color variables for light and dark modes using a monochromatic grayscale palette with no hue or chroma values, plus base styles for borders and background/foreground colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with meta tags for modxrdx.io domain, Open Graph and Twitter Card configuration for MOD x RDX branding, canonical URL, and script tag loading the React application from main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router configuration defining routes for home (/), create post (/create), about (/about), contact (/contact), and privacy (/privacy) pages, all wrapped in the Layout component.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Layout component with sticky header containing icon.png logo with 'MOD x RDX' text (clickable link to home), desktop navigation links, mobile sheet menu with the same logo/text, and footer with copyright and attribution.
frontend/src/components/PostCard.tsx: Card component rendering posts with title, description, timestamp, and content type badge, displaying text content as prose, links with preview images and copy button, or images with fallback error handling.
frontend/src/components/SearchBar.tsx: Search input component with search icon, clear button (X), and controlled value for filtering posts by title or description.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and caches a backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCopyToClipboard.ts: Custom hook providing copyToClipboard function using the Clipboard API and isCopied state that resets after 2 seconds.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity storage, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching all posts, searching posts, and creating posts using the backend actor, with automatic cache invalidation on mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark theme colors (purple/violet hue at 285°), typography styles, and image context menu settings.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the root component wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider for state management and authentication.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Static page displaying the platform's mission, features (text/link/image sharing, search, no login), and technology stack (Internet Computer blockchain).
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Contact page with clickable cards linking to Instagram (@modxrdx) and Telegram (@MODxRDX) social media accounts.
frontend/src/pages/CreatePostPage.tsx: Form page for creating new posts with fields for title, description, content type (text/link/image), content, and optional image URL, using the useCreatePost mutation hook.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Main landing page displaying the MOD x RDX logo, search bar, and a list of posts (all or filtered by search term) with loading skeletons.
frontend/src/pages/PrivacyPolicyPage.tsx: Privacy policy page explaining data collection (content, usage data), usage, storage on Internet Computer blockchain, and third-party services (content appears truncated).
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration file that defines custom theme extensions including OKLCH color system with CSS variables, custom spacing, animations, and integrates typography, container queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state file tracking a static content-sharing website with features for posting text/links/images, search functionality, responsive design, and custom domain support (modxrdx.io), using localStorage for data persistence without backend authentication.
